final_message:
Both files are done and every constraint checks out mechanically.

**`summary.json`**
```json
{
  "total_revenue": 7154.44,
  "orders": 30,
  "median_order_value": 204.94,
  "top_product_by_revenue": "Gadget",
  "revenue_by_region": {"North": 2176.35, "South": 1732.48, "East": 1830.79, "West": 1414.82}
}
```
Exactly the five required keys; correct types (number, int, number, string, object); every region (North/South/East/West) mapped.

**`REPORT.md`**
- Exactly four H2 headings in the required order, no other headings of any level.
- 179 words total (≤250).
- Overview states total revenue as `$7,154.44` and `30 orders`.
- Recommendations has exactly three `- ` bullets (17/15/14 words each, all ≤25), grounded in the actual figures.
- None of the forbidden words appear.

Numbers computed directly from all 30 CSV rows (revenue = units × unit_price). Gadget is top product at $2,392.00; median of the 30 per-order revenues is $204.94 (even count → mean of the two middle values). No commits made; work stayed inside the current directory.
